retry_reason: Not a refcount wrapper; retry semantics depend on allocation failure, not refcount lifecycle.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to allocate and initialize a CAN XL sk_buff with extensive setup (protocol, flags, length, extension, ifindex). No explicit refcount get/put/set on an existing object; the skb reference count is initialized implicitly via netdev_alloc_skb, but that is part of allocation, not a refcount wrapper. The function is a combined allocation and initialization helper, not a reference-count wrapper.
